task_completion.description: Open the formatting instructions and the SaaS Terms of Service document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the legal_formatting_instructions.txt file open in a text editor and the saas_terms_of_service.odt file open in a GUI word processor (e.g., Calligra Words).

Headings such as '8. WARRANTY DISCLAIMER', '9. LIMITATION OF LIABILITY', and 'Exhibit A: Subscription Tiers' are visually formatted to stand out from the body text (e.g., bolded, different font size, or centered).

task_completion.description: Convert the body text of Section 8 to ALL CAPS.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The paragraph under '8. WARRANTY DISCLAIMER' (starting with 'THE SERVICES AND ALL RELATED COMPONENTS...') is entirely in uppercase letters.

task_completion.description: Convert the body text of Section 9 to ALL CAPS.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The paragraph under '9. LIMITATION OF LIABILITY' (starting with 'IN NO EVENT SHALL CLOUDSCALE ANALYTICS...') is entirely in uppercase letters.

task_completion.description: Convert the pricing data in Exhibit A into a table.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The pricing data under 'Exhibit A: Subscription Tiers' is organized into a structured table with visible rows and columns, rather than plain text.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical word processor to edit the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: The document editing occurs within a GUI word processor application (like Calligra Words or LibreOffice Writer), not a plain text editor or via terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent created a real table for Exhibit A.
integrity.visual_evidence: The table in Exhibit A shows actual word processor table structures (e.g., cell borders, gridlines, or table manipulation UI elements), not just text aligned with spaces or tabs.

integrity.description: The agent preserved the original text content while formatting.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text content of the warranty and liability sections matches the original wording, just converted to uppercase. The agent did not paste in generic placeholder text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The document is a SaaS Terms of Service for 'CloudScale Analytics'. Section 8 (WARRANTY DISCLAIMER) original text starts with 'The services and all related components...'. Section 9 (LIMITATION OF LIABILITY) original text starts with 'In no event shall CloudScale Analytics...'. Both of these specific paragraphs must be visually confirmed to be in ALL CAPS. Exhibit A contains 'Subscription Tiers' pricing data which must be formatted as a table.
